close_reason: Implemented quiet mode: (1) Added welcomeMessage option for custom shell entry message, (2) Added --quiet/-q flag to tk, (3) tk sync runs silently by default. Limitation: devenv task trace output (Running/Succeeded) cannot be suppressed - this is a devenv limitation requiring upstream changes.
description:
Currently entering the devenv shell produces verbose output:

```
Buck2 configured by turnkey
  Toolchains: go, python, cxx, genrule
  Runtime deps:
  Go deps: /nix/store/05dcq77q6v3icpinfn1yxxwl0biii22f-go-deps-cell
  Cell: /nix/store/d8kmd3qn19phn0p7wds7wzvdhhr8ikyz-turnkey-toolchains-cell
Running tasks     devenv:enterShell
Succeeded         devenv:enterShell                        8ms
1 Succeeded                         9.32ms
```

Should be simplified to something like:
```
Entering <project-name> turnkey shell
```

Or make verbosity configurable with a quiet mode by default.

The devenv task output ("Running tasks...", "Succeeded...") is from devenv itself, not turnkey - may need separate handling.
title: Simplify devenv shell entry messages
